results.description: DESCRIPTION:THIS ACTION APPROVES AN AWARD IN THE AMOUNT OF $60,000 TO JACKSON STATE UNIVERSITY (JSU). THE PURPOSE OF THIS GRANT IS TO PROVIDE WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT AND TRAINING THAT SPECIFICALLY TARGETS INDIVIDUALS WHO ARE INTERESTED IN BECOMING CERTIFICATION WATER TECHNICIANS. ACTIVITIES INCLUDE RECRUITMENT OF PARTICIPANTS FOR THE WATER TECHNICIAN TRAININGS, SECURE HIGHLY QUALIFIED FACILITATORS TO SERVE AS EDUCATIONAL TRAINING CONSULTANTS TO PREPARE PARTICIPANTS FOR THE CERTIFICATION EXAMINATION, HOST IN-PERSON, HYBRID, AND SYNCHRONOUS ONLINE PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPMENT TO ALLOW MAXIMUM FLEXIBILITY FOR INITIAL CERTIFICATION AND CONTINUING EDUCATION UNITS FOR WATER TECHNICIANS AND PROVIDE ACCESS TO POST-CERTIFICATION FOLLOW-UP TRAINING FOR PARTICIPANTS WHO MAY NEED ADDITIONAL SUPPORT IN PASSING THE CERTIFICATION EXAMINATIONS. ANTICIPATED DELIVERABLES INCLUDE THE CENTER FOR PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPMENT STAFF WILL WORK FOCUS ON RECRUITING WATER TECHNICIANS FROM AMONG THE FOLLOWING GROUPS: JSU STUDENTS WHO DESIRE TO ENHANCE THEIR UNDERGRADUATE DEGREES WITH WORK-RELATED CERTIFICATIONS, JACKSON PUBLIC SCHOOL, HIGH SCHOOL SENIORS ENROLLED IN CAREER ACADEMIES AND NEED TO COMPLETE APPRENTICESHIP CREDITS, JACKSON, MISSISSIPPI RESIDENTS ARE CURRENTLY SEEKING EMPLOYMENT, AND ADULT LEARNERS AGE 18-23 WHO RECENTLY COMPLETED A GENERAL EDUCATION DIPLOMA. THE INTENDED BENEFICIARIES INCLUDE THE CITIZENS OF THE STATE OF MISSISSIPPI.ACTIVITIES:-SUBRECIPIENT:NO SUBAWARDS ARE INCLUDED IN THIS ASSISTANCE AGREEMENT.OUTCOMES:-
